name: horosa-core-js
description: Headless Horosa engine: local 统摄法 (tongshefa) calculation plus ken-response formatting for qimen/taiyi/jinkou into 星阙 aiExport.js sections.

engines.//: canping/heluo's vendored JSON uses `import ... with { type: 'json' }` (import attributes), which needs Node >= 20.10. tools/index.js imports them at the top, so an older Node would fail to load ALL JS tools, not just 数算. The bundled offline runtime ships Node 22; this floor guards dev/PATH-node setups.
